calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-22-2021 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-27-2021 Continued To Nov-22-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nicholas Jay, via ZOOM, for Linda Lam, Personal Representative.

Mr. Jay begins by apologizing to the court for not replying to the Examiner sooner and reports that he submitted a response and proposed order last Friday for e-filing. Mr. Jay then reports that both he and the Executor are waiving fees. The court instructs Mr. Jay to take the proper steps to ensure that courtesy copies are appropriately delivered to the assigned Examiner prior to the next calling of this matter. Mr. Jay replies that he will deliver courtesy copies of his pleadings to the Examiner as soon as they are filed.

The Accounting is continued to Nov-22-2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: E. Prado. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-23-2021 Continued To Sep-27-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-19-2021 Continued To Aug-23-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-09-2021 Continued To Jul-19-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nicholas Jay, via ZOOM, counsel for Linda Lam, Executor.

Counsel at the outset apologizes to the court for failing to reply to the court regarding this matter. Counsel reports that he had to attend to family matters a month or so after filing his petition. Counsel reports that he just submitted bank accounts for electronic filing to address Examiner's notes. The court then turns to the fees that counsel is requesting in his accounting. Counsel reports that they had been incorrectly calculated and advises that he will not be seeking the additional fees. The court then points counsel to the wording of the proposed order and suggests that counsel review the order and submit a new one along with any recent filings to the Examiner via mail, addressed directly to the attention of the Examiner.

After additional discussion, the Accounting Petition is continued to July 19, 2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Nov-25-2020 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Nov-25-2020 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Oct-14-2020 Continued To Nov-25-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor Linda Lim and the Attorney Nicholas Jay to appear on November 25, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the final inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Helen Trowbridge. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
